_notes: Phase 2-3: Formula sources + individual tasks including harp songs, event perks, abiphone contacts, essence shop, trophy fish, dojo, Crimson Isle rep, timecharms, community shop, chocolate factory, Jacob's gold medals, dolphin milestones. Task IDs marked [unverified] are inferred from patterns.

formula_sources.name: Skill Level Up
formula_sources.formula: Per skill level: 1-10 → +5, 11-25 → +10, 26-50 → +20, 51-60 → +30. Across 13 skills (farming, mining, combat, foraging, fishing, enchanting, alchemy, taming, carpentry, runecrafting, social, hunting — note: wiki says all skills count).

formula_sources.name: Fairy Souls
formula_sources.formula: Per 5 fairy souls exchanged: +10 XP. 253 total souls = 49 exchanges (last 3 souls don't count) = 490 XP max. Uses fairy_exchanges not total_collected.

formula_sources.name: Accessory Bag (Magical Power)
formula_sources.formula: Per Magical Power: +1 XP. No cap.

formula_sources.name: Pet Score
formula_sources.formula: Per pet score point: +3 XP. No cap.

formula_sources.name: Collections
formula_sources.formula: Per collection milestone reached: +4 XP. Requires fetching collection tier thresholds from API to count milestones.

formula_sources.name: Catacombs Level Up
formula_sources.formula: Per catacombs level: 1-39 → +20, 40-50 → +40.

formula_sources.name: Class Level Up
formula_sources.formula: Per class level: +4 XP. 5 classes × 50 levels = 250 levels × 4 = 1000 max.

formula_sources.name: Slayer Level Up
formula_sources.formula: Per slayer level: L1 +15, L2 +25, L3 +35, L4 +50, L5 +70, L6 +100, L7 +125, L8 +150, L9 +150. 6 slayers (zombie/spider/wolf/enderman/blaze/vampire — vampire max 5).

formula_sources.name: Bestiary Progress
formula_sources.formula: Per bestiary tier: +1 XP. Every 10 milestones: +10 bonus XP. Uses last_claimed_milestone as tier count.

formula_sources.name: Powder (Mithril/Gemstone/Glacite)
formula_sources.formula: Mithril: per 2,400 powder → +1 XP (linear up to 600K, then exponential decay to 12.5M). Gemstone: per 2,500 → +1 (linear to 600K, decay to 20M). Glacite: per 2,500 → +1 (linear to 600K, decay to 20M). Lifetime powder = available + spent.
formula_sources.api_path: member.mining_core.powder_mithril + powder_spent_mithril, powder_gemstone + powder_spent_gemstone, powder_glacite + powder_spent_glacite

formula_sources.name: Commission Milestones
formula_sources.formula: Tier 1 +20, T2 +30, T3 +30, T4 +50, T5 +50, T6 +75. Cannot directly read milestone tier from API — estimated from commission count if available.
formula_sources.api_path: unknown — may need to infer from HotM level or commission data

formula_sources.name: Crystal Nucleus Runs
formula_sources.formula: Per completed run: +4 XP. Caps at 50 runs. Run count estimated from crystal total_placed (min across 5 required crystals).

formula_sources.name: Peak of the Mountain
formula_sources.formula: T1 +25, T2 +35, T3 +50, T4 +65, T5 +75, T6 +100, T7 +125, T8 +150, T9 +175, T10 +200. Requires HotM 7 to unlock. Level = core_of_the_mountain node level.

formula_sources.name: Fast Travels Unlocked
formula_sources.formula: Per travel scroll: +15 XP. Counted from FAST_TRAVEL_* entries in completed_tasks.

formula_sources.name: Museum Progression
formula_sources.formula: Each donated item gives SBXP based on item value. Milestones at every 100 Museum XP. Max 2,797 SBXP. Calculated from items + special donated count with estimated XP per item.

formula_sources.name: Garden Level
formula_sources.formula: Per garden level: +10 XP. Max level 14 = 140 XP. Garden XP from data.garden.garden.garden_experience.

formula_sources.name: Garden Visitors Served
formula_sources.formula: Per unique visitor milestone: +3 XP. Max 32 milestones = 96 XP.

formula_sources.name: Garden Unlocked Plots
formula_sources.formula: Per unlocked plot: +5 XP. Max 24 plots = 120 XP.

formula_sources.name: Garden Crop Upgrades
formula_sources.formula: Per crop upgrade purchased: +1 XP. 9 crops × 10 tiers = 90 max.

formula_sources.name: Garden Crop Milestones
formula_sources.formula: Per crop milestone reached: +1 XP. Max 460.

formula_sources.name: Garden Composter Upgrades
formula_sources.formula: Per composter upgrade tier. T1-7: +1, T8-13: +2, T14-19: +3, T20-25: +4. 5 upgrades × 25 tiers. Max 305 XP.

formula_sources.name: Fossil Research
formula_sources.formula: Per unique fossil donated: +10 XP. Max 8 fossils = 80 XP.

formula_sources.name: The Dojo
formula_sources.formula: White +20, Yellow +30, Green +50, Blue +75, Brown +100, Black +150. Max 425 XP.
